title: Port bee-qualifying/SKILL.md with D13 park-Status fix and atomic feature-entry fix; render Claude/Codex projections
action: Create skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md in this repo. Content = the source file at /home/vantt/projects/herdr-gateway--wt--backlog-auto-triage/.claude/skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md, read verbatim, PLUS exactly two additive blocks (nothing else changed, nothing reworded, nothing removed) per plan.md's Approach: (1) a new Flow step 0 mirroring skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md's own step 0 pattern -- atomic 'node .bee/bin/bee.mjs state start-feature --feature <slug> --mode <mode>' entry from idle, skipped when a feature is already active; existing steps 1-4 keep their numbers unchanged; (2) a new sub-step inside existing Flow step 4b (Park), between the CONTEXT.md brief hand-off and 'Stop': instruct bee-context-locking to also set the backlog row's Status to parked (per D13), in the same commit as the brief -- bee-context-locking does not exist yet (slice 2), so this only fixes what bee-qualifying asks for, not what fulfills it. Cite D11 (skill names), D13 (fix 1), and CONTEXT.md's Existing Code Context entry for skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md step 0 (fix 2 mirror source). After the file is written, render this repo's normal per-runtime projections by running the onboarding sync (node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply --json) -- do NOT hand-copy the file into .claude/skills/ or .agents/skills/. IMPORTANT (plan-checker finding): this worktree's umask leaves newly created files group-writable (664/775) which fails the repo's own release_manifest mode check (the same class of issue cell backlog-auto-triage-0 fixes elsewhere) -- after creating skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md and after the render sync produces the two projections, chmod 644 all three files before running verify.

truths: skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md exists and its content is the source file plus exactly the two named additive blocks -- no other prose drift
New Flow step 0 present, numbered 0 (existing steps 1-4 unrenumbered), pattern-matches skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md step 0

Flow step 4b contains the new Status: parked instruction routed via bee-context-locking, positioned before Stop -- this must be a genuinely NEW sentence, not already present in the source (source already contains the word 'parked' 4 times as ordinary vocabulary; the fix is a new instruction, not just the word appearing)
Rendered .claude/skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md and .agents/skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md exist and carry this repo's render-provenance marker (produced by the onboarding sync, not hand-copied)
prohibitions: Do not modify skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md or any other existing skill in this cell
Do not invent a new park-brief file format -- D5 (reuse CONTEXT.md Outstanding Questions) is preserved verbatim from source
Do not hand-write .claude/skills/bee-qualifying/ or .agents/skills/bee-qualifying/ -- must come from the onboarding sync
Do not change any Flow step's numbering other than inserting step 0

verify: test -f skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md && test -f .claude/skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md && grep -q 'state start-feature' skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md && [ "$(grep -c 'parked' skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md)" -ge 5 ]

trace.outcome: Ported bee-qualifying/SKILL.md with both fixes; rendered Claude/Codex projections via onboarding sync
